title: OreBound
body:
OreBound – A Mod Packed with Unique Ores & Tools!

 - **Experience Ore** *(Overworld, Y=-32 to 8)*
   - Requires Iron+ to mine.

   - Drops multiple experience orbs when broken.

 - **Mystral** *(Overworld, Y=-16 to 24)*
   - Requires Iron+ to mine. 

   - Craft Mystral tools and the Mystral Orb.

   - Right-click to save a location, then hold for 5 seconds to teleport back (Overworld only).

 - **Luminite** *(Overworld, Y=-32 to 32)*
   - Requires Iron+ to mine. 

   - Craft Luminite Tools – place light sources at the cost of durability.

   - Luminite Drill – breaks 4 blocks in a straight line.

 - **Infernite** *(The Nether, Y=0 to 48)*
   - Requires Diamond+ to mine. 

   - Upgrade Netherite gear using a new smithing template.

   - Infernite Gear ignites enemies and melts mined blocks.

 - **Stellar Ore** *(Overworld, Y=-64 to 32)*
   - Requires Iron+ to mine. 

   - Craft a Gaze Sensor – detects player gaze, emits redstone signals, and can be configured with nametags.

   - Stellar Dust now crafts End Crystals.

 - Cavern Sapphire *(Overworld, Y=-32 to 32)*
   - Requires Stone+ to mine. 

   - Purely decorative blue ore.

 - **Aetherite** *(The End, Y=-64 to 320)*
   - Requires Diamond+ to mine. 

   - Gravity-affected ore.

   - Craft the Aetherite Lift – when powered by redstone, launches entities upward!

 - **Titanium Ore** *(Nether, Y=32+)*
   - Requires Diamond+ to mine. Hard to break, but weak to explosions.

   - Titanium Pressure Plate – Only triggers for armored players/mobs.

   - Titanium Vibro-Mechanism – When powered, slowly breaks blocks in a 3-block radius below it.

   - Titanium Breaker – Instantly mines a 3×3 area.

 - **Oxide Ore** *(Overworld, Y=-32 to 16)*
   - Requires Diamond+ to mine. Turns into Liquid Oxide when mined.

   - Liquid Oxide + Water = Oxide Ingot-Bucket.

   - Oxide Ingot – Scoops liquids, stacks to 8.

   - Multi-Tool – Mines all block types at Iron speed.

   - Liquid Oxide Irrigation – Speeds up crop growth nearby.

 - **Powder Ore** *(Overworld, Y=32 to 80)*
   - Requires Stone+ to mine. Explodes when mined (unless touching water).

   - Amplified Crafting – Replacing gunpowder with Powder Ingot increases output.

   - Landmine – Explodes 12 ticks after being stepped on.
